key.name: playback-icons-layout
key.description: Controls how the playback icons are arranged in the panel indicator.

key.name: spacing
key.description: Sets the horizontal distance, in pixels, between the track title and the playback control icons.

key.name: set-title-width
key.description: Specifies the maximum width, in pixels, of the track title label before it is ellipsized.

key.name: enable-seek
key.description: Allows seeking forward or backward in the current track using the mouse scroll wheel over the forward icon.

key.name: seek-offset
key.summary: The number of seconds to seek forward.
key.description: Specified number of seconds by the seeks forward in the current track .

key.name: progress-indicator-width
key.description: Sets the width of the seek progress label in characters.

key.name: show-progress-indicator
key.description: Shows the seek progress OSD indicator when scrolling to seek.

key.name: preferred-volume
key.description: Stores the preferred volume level as a percentage. Middle-clicking the track label applies this saved value.
